name: Sri Lanka Watalappan (Spiced Coconut Custard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly beat the eggs.
2. Mix jaggery and water separately and boil until the jaggery has melted. Allow to cool.
3. Gradually add the cooled melted jaggery mixture and coconut milk to the eggs, continuously beating.
4. Add a pinch of cardamom powder, cinnamon, nutmeg powder, and rose essence.
5. Pour the batter into a greased bowl. Cover with grease-proof paper.
6. Steam for 1-1/2 hours.
7. Sprinkle cashew nuts before or after steaming.
